query:
-- Apollo monthly usage
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month,
  COUNT(*) as reveals,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as credits
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 6;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
-- Apollo monthly usage
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m') as month,
  COUNT(*) as reveals,
  SUM(creditsUsed) as credits
FROM apolloCreditLog
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(createdAt, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 6;
